reason: M28 requirements and acceptance criteria for queued, cancellable, retryable rebuilds.
Technical design for queue state, coalescing, cancellation, retry, API/CLI, and rollout.
Current code entry points, safety contracts, and test references for implementation.
Existing managed-library, registry/blob-store, and dirty-state persistence contracts.
ServiceError codes and safe API error shape for queue/cancel/retry failures.
Testing and dependency boundaries for backend changes.
Safe logging and low-cardinality operational fields for queue status.
M28 spans API, CLI, state, storage, metrics, and docs.
